concepts: Basic game physics and collision detection

soft_skills: Collaboration with designers, artists, and developers
Creativity in gameplay design and implementation
Attention to detail in gameplay behaviour and performance

responsibilities: Develop gameplay features and mechanics using game engines
Write scripts and code for player interactions and game systems
